subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Him Who hath awakened His servants by His voice, Who hath exalted them to the heaven of His knowledge
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی ایقظ عباده بندائه و رفعهم الی سماء عرفانه و زینهم بطراز العدل
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
